message:
chore(beads): track clippy ok_or_fun_call fix and rustfmt drift issues (bd-95zg, bd-tf9l)

Add two new closed issue entries to the beads issue tracker:
- bd-95zg: Fixed clippy or_fun_call warning in ffs-core btrfs context
  path by switching ok_or to ok_or_else for lazy error construction.
- bd-tf9l: Fixed rustfmt drift in ffs-core request paths around the
  btrfs context unwrap and DIR_ITEM removal helpers.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
